title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: HILLSBORO MULTI-SERVICE CENTER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial help with garbage, water, internet, electric, and heating fuel bills (oil, propane, firewood, and pellets). Payments go directly to the utility company. Applications are processed in the order received, with an estimated wait time of 4–6 weeks. Assistance is based on available funds. 1001 SW Baseline Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Household is at or below 60% of the Oregon Area Median Income (AMI). See website for a list of eligible utility companies. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm, closed national holidays Email (503) 615-0771 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 615-0771 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Copy of utility bill, income verification for all household members, date of birth for all household members, and Social Security number for all household members (if available) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic, interpretation by arrangement. Online form available in English and Spanish. AREA SERVED: Electric, gas, and heating fuel assistance: Washington County Water assistance: Cities of Beaverton and Hillsboro, and Tualatin Valley Water District Garbage assistance: Beaverton or unincorporated Washington County Internet assistance: City of Hillsboro SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 57 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Internet Service Payment Assistance Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HOUSING/SHELTER - COMMUNITY CONNECT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REPAIR ASSISTANCE FOR BEAVERTON RESIDENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTER SUPPORT PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY CONSERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOUSING FAMILY ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES MATERIAL GOODS - SENIOR PORTABLE AC MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO MULTI-SERVICE CENTER
